items.definition_en: An airplane is a vehicle that flies in the sky.
items.example_en: The airplane took off from the airport.

items.definition_en: A helicopter is an aircraft that flies using rotating blades.
items.example_en: The helicopter landed on the hospital roof.

items.definition_en: A jet is a fast aircraft powered by jet engines.
items.example_en: The jet flew across the ocean.

items.definition_en: A glider is an aircraft that flies without an engine.
items.example_en: The glider moved quietly through the air.

items.definition_en: A hot-air balloon is a large balloon that carries people in a basket.
items.example_en: We saw a hot-air balloon floating over the field.

items.definition_en: A biplane is an old-fashioned airplane with two wings on each side.
items.example_en: The biplane performed tricks at the show.

items.definition_en: A monoplane is a plane with one set of wings.
items.example_en: The small monoplane flew low over the village.

items.definition_en: An airliner is a large airplane for carrying many passengers.
items.example_en: The airliner was full of holiday travelers.

items.definition_en: A seaplane is an airplane that can land on water.
items.example_en: The seaplane landed next to the dock.

items.definition_en: An aircraft is any vehicle that flies in the sky.
items.example_en: That museum displays old and new aircraft.

items.definition_en: A propeller plane is a type of airplane with spinning blades.
items.example_en: The propeller plane made a loud noise as it started.

items.definition_en: A blimp is a large balloon-like aircraft that floats in the air.
items.example_en: The blimp flew over the stadium during the game.

items.definition_en: A drone is a small aircraft with no pilot on board.
items.example_en: The drone took pictures high above the park.

items.definition_en: A hang glider is a light aircraft without an engine held by a pilot.
items.example_en: He flew a hang glider off the mountain.

items.definition_en: A jumbo jet is a very large jet plane for many passengers.
items.example_en: We flew to New York in a jumbo jet.

items.definition_en: A private plane is a small aircraft owned by one person or company.
items.example_en: He flew to France in his private plane.

items.definition_en: A charter flight is an airplane trip hired by one group.
items.example_en: They booked a charter flight for their wedding trip.

items.definition_en: A trainer aircraft is used for teaching people to fly.
items.example_en: The student took lessons in a trainer aircraft.

items.definition_en: A paraglider is a light aircraft with a fabric wing flown by one person.
items.example_en: She went for a flight in a paraglider.

items.definition_en: An ultralight is a very light, small aircraft for one or two people.
items.example_en: He built his own ultralight in his garage.
